zh.Ottery by Tavistock, Devon, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 白 塔維斯托可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Bonville於1362年出生在英國薩默塞特修頓時，她的父親Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff30歲，母親Margaret d'Aumarle19歲。她於1390年與Thomas Carew在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年7月26日在英國戴文享年89歲，埋葬在英國素瑞貝丁頓。

zh-hans.Ottery by Tavistock, Devon, England, Uni: 英国英格兰戴文奧特利 白 塔維斯托可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Bonville于1362年出生在英国薩默塞特修頓时，她的父亲Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff30岁，母亲Margaret d'Aumarle19岁。她于1390年与Thomas Carew在英国薩默塞特修頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年7月26日在英国戴文享年89岁，埋葬在英国素瑞貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Bonville was born in 1362, in Chewton, Somerset, England, her father, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, was 30 and her mother, Margaret d'Aumarle, was 19. She married Thomas Carew in 1390, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 July 1451, in Devon, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Beddington, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Bonville est née en 1362, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Aumarle, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Carew en 1390, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1451, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Bonville 1362 in Chewton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret d'Aumarle 19. Sie hat 1390 in Chewton, Somerset, England Thomas Carew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1451 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Beddington, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Bonville è nata il nel 1362 nel Chewton, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret d'Aumarle, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Carew nel 1390, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1451, nel Devon, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Beddington, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Bonvilleが1362年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriffは30歳，母Margaret d'Aumarleは19歳であった。1390年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでThomas Carewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年7月26日にイギリスデボンで89歳で死去し，イギリススリーベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Ottery by Tavistock, Devon, England, Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 비 타비스톡
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Bonville(이)가 1362년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret d'Aumarle(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Thomas Carew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 7월 26일 영국 데폰에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Carew em 1390, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Ottery by Tavistock, Devon, England, Uni: оттири би тавистокк, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Bonville родилась в 1362 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Aumarle, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Carew в 1390 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1451 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Carew en 1390, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1451, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra.
